samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Design a simplified radix-2 divider on 8-bit numbers.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst">Reset signal.</input>
        <input id="sign">Signed or unsigned operation.</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[15:0]">Input operand DIVIDEND.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[15:0]">Input operand DIVISOR.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">Valid operation request.</input>
        <input id="res_ready">The output has already been consumed.</input>
        <output id="res_valid">The result is valid.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">Output result.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="IDLE">0</param>
        <param id="SUB">1</param>
        <param id="SEL">2</param>
        <param id="SHIFT">3</param>
        <param id="DONE">4</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">Count cycles.</reg>
        <reg id="start_cnt">Start count.</reg>
        <reg id="neg_divisor" width_description="[15:0]">Negated divisor.</reg>
        <reg id="sr" width_description="[15:0]">Shift register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    <task id="initialization">
        <block>
            <assign name="sr" value="8'b0" />
            <assign name="cnt" value="4'b0" />
            <assign name="start_cnt" value="1'b1" />
            <assign name="neg_divisor" value="-divisor" />
        </block>
    </task>
    <always @("posedge clk or posedge rst")>
        <block>
            <if condition="rst">
                <block>
                    <assign name="cnt" value="4'b0" />
                    <assign name="start_cnt" value="1'b0" />
                </block>
            </if>
            <else>
                <block>
                    <if condition="cnt[3]">
                        <block>
                            <assign name="cnt" value="4'b0" />
                            <assign name="start_cnt" value="1'b0" />
                            <assign name="sr" value="[neg_divisor, sr[15:1]]" />
                        </block>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <block>
                            <assign name="cnt" value="cnt + 4'b1" />
                            <assign name="start_cnt" value="1'b1" />
                            <assign name="sr" value="[sr[15:1]]" />
                        </block>
                    </else>
                </block>
            </else>
        </block>
    </always>
    <always @("posedge clk or posedge rst")>
        <block>
            <if condition="rst">
                <block>
                    <assign name="res_valid" value="1'b0" />
                </block>
            </if>
            <else>
                <block>
                    <if condition="cnt[3]">
                        <block>
                            <assign name="res_valid" value="1'b1" />
                        </block>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <block>
                            <assign name="res_valid" value="res_valid & res_ready" />
                        </block>
                    </else>
                </block>
            </else>
        </block>
    </always>
    </implementation>
</module>
